CAN: check satisfiability over QF_LIA (quantifier-free linear integer arithmetic)
check satisfiability over QF_LRA (linear real arithmetic)
detect UNSAT via contradiction across theories
work independently of z3 as a cross-validation solver
CANNOT: decide non-linear arithmetic in general (may return unknown)
handle quantified formulas as efficiently as z3 in all cases
replace symbolic computation (use sympy for algebra)
provide proof certificates without extra options configuration

sat_integer_arith.detail: x+y=10, x>3, y>3 must be SAT

unsat_detection.detail: a>5 AND a<2 must be UNSAT

bool_sat.detail: (p OR q) AND NOT p must be SAT with q=True

real_arithmetic.detail: 0 < rx < 1 over reals must be SAT

no_integer_solution.detail: n+n=3 has no integer solution, must be UNSAT

contradictory_equalities.detail: a+b=1 AND a+b=2 must be UNSAT

tight_equality.detail: x>=0 AND x<=0 forces x=0, must be SAT

empty_solver.detail: empty constraint set must be SAT
